series_metadata.series_title: Underground Storage Tank Registration and Permit Files
series_metadata.series_description: File contains the application, correspondence, annual renewals, facility construction documents, proof of financial responsibility, ownership validation, federal registration forms, and other support documents required for underground storage tank facilities to operate in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain in office permanently or until the file is converted to a machine readable format, then destroy. ; Electronic: Maintain machine readable records permanently. ; Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until converted to machine readable format. Upon confirmation machine readable records have been checked for quality and completeness, destroy paper copy., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
